Choosing between Python and Rust depends on your specific needs. Python is great for rapid development, data analysis, and machine learning due to its simplicity and extensive library support. Rust, on the other hand, excels in systems programming, offering high performance and memory safety. If you need speed and control over system resources, Rust is the way to go.
